## coa kill

Free the nest and unmount filesystems

### Synopsis

Safely tears down the remastering environment. 
It uses MNT_DETACH to unmount the OverlayFS and virtual API filesystems (/dev, /proc, /sys) without affecting the running host, then removes the temporary workspace.

```
coa kill [flags]
```

### Examples

```
  # Clean up the default workspace
  sudo coa kill
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for kill
```
